subject: Update of README.md for aai-common Dockerfiles
commit_message:
Update of README.md for aai-common Dockerfiles

README.md was updated to reflect recent changes in aai-common
image build process and its naming and tagging.

Change-Id: I37c3c7d6c46a21437a27cd8a9afe08c1c3aa408e
Issue-ID: INT-1024
Signed-off-by: Martin Klozik <martin.klozik@tieto.com>

Patch Set 1:

Apart of fixing README.md, I was wondering if new aai-common jobs will produce correct alpine and ubuntu based images. Unfortunately new jobs have failed. I've contacted Jess by email (all of you in CC) for help with issue identification and fixing.

So even in case you would agree with my README.md changes, PLEASE don't MERGE this patch until Jobs will be fixed. So we can "reverify" their functionality with this patch.

Thanks!

Patch Set 1:

Hi all,

Jess fixed docker hub credentials configuration for AAI repo. So new jobs for build of aai-common docker images is working now.

Feel free to review and merge this patch - so we will see if also a merge jobs will succeed and push new aai-common-alpine and aai-common-ubuntu images into the Nexus3.

After that you could test newly built aai-common images and Dmitry will start to modify his patches for AAI containers to use this base images.

--Martin
